  export const texts = [{"value":"通过主题可以统一 Markdown 的字体、颜色、间距等视觉风格，内置 light / dark，也可通过 CSS 变量或覆盖样式做自定义。","paraId":0},{"value":"引入对应主题样式并为根节点设置主题类名即可：","paraId":1,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"import { XMarkdown } from '@ant-design/x-markdown';\nimport '@ant-design/x-markdown/themes/light.css';\n\nexport default () => <XMarkdown className=\"x-markdown-light\" content=\"# Hello\" />;\n","paraId":2,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"基于内置主题类（推荐 ","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"x-markdown-light","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"）叠加一个自定义类。","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"在自定义类里覆盖需要的 CSS 变量。","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"仅维护你关心的变量，其余继续继承内置主题值。","paraId":3,"tocIndex":4},{"value":".x-markdown-light.x-markdown-custom {\n  --primary-color: #0f766e;\n  --primary-color-hover: #0d9488;\n  --heading-color: #0f172a;\n  --text-color: #1f2937;\n  --light-bg: rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.08);\n}\n","paraId":4,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"完整变量名请参考 ","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"packages/x-markdown/src/themes/light.css","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4},{"value":" 与 ","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"packages/x-markdown/src/themes/dark.css","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"。","paraId":5,"tocIndex":4}];
